$comment: LIB-FIXTURES — synthetic SIDECAR metadata marker the indexer merges into the asset's archive-index-entry (release-spec §8.6 approved content auto-indexes back with approval lineage; DD-14 usage written to the cooldown ledger). Lives beside st1-on-table.jpg so the indexer can pick up pre-existing approval_lineage + usage_history rather than re-deriving them from vision. The merged result is the st1-on-table entry in expected/index-entries.json. ALL SYNTHETIC — invented Acme Cosmos product, no real brand or instance data; the content_id / decision_ref / timestamps are placeholders.
